title: ホープフルSの後に・進む覚悟

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hmph. My results were sufficient. However...

text_block_list.name: Busy Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Hey, who's next for the interview? Where's the
schedule?

text_block_list.name: Busy Assistant
text_block_list.text:
If I remember correctly, the runner expected to
be Umamusume of the year is at another venue...

text_block_list.name: Busy Reporter
text_block_list.text:
That senior?! Then let's hurry up and get outta
here! Grab all the equipment, quick!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
This was just a junior race. Everyone considers this
to be an early stage.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
What's important is how we act from here on, and
how we distinguish ourselves in future races.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
We're heading in the right direction, Trainer. As a
first-rate Umamusume, I won't stray from the path
ahead.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Let's keep our sights on the Triple Crown tour.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Racers only get one chance to participate in the
Triple Crown tour, a series comprised of the
Satsuki Sho, the Japanese Derby, and the Kikuka
Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It goes without saying, but many Umamusume
dream of achieving victory there, so the
competition will surely be fierce.
choice_data_list: If you're prepared, then let's do it.
If you're prepared, then let's do it.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I've been prepared for it long before I ever came
to this academy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, it's decided. Our next objective
will be the first race of the Triple Crown tour: the
Satsuki Sho.
